mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in industrial production index signals expanding manufacturing output, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns through higher corporate earnings expectations.
failure_condition: Walk-forward accuracy is below 52% over a 3-year rolling window or mean forward return following INDPRO increases is not positive.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in the unemployment rate of more than 0.3 percentage points over a three-month period signals labor market deterioration, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns via downward earnings revisions.
failure_condition: S&P 500 produces positive 20-day returns in more than 50% of instances when the trigger fires, or the t-statistic of the mean return difference versus baseline is insignificant (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in the federal funds rate concurrent with a month-over-month increase in the consumer price index signals restrictive real monetary policy, which reduces equity valuations and produces negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The interaction term between FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL exhibits a rank correlation with forward returns above zero over any 2-year rolling window, or standalone FEDFUNDS predicts negative returns without CPI acceleration.

mechanism_narrative: During an inflationary monetary tightening cycle, a month-over-month increase in the federal funds rate signals sustained restrictive policy, which raises discount rates and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Positive 5-day forward returns occur in more than 50% of months during tightening cycles when FEDFUNDS increases, or the mean return conditional on increases is not significantly negative.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month contraction in real retail sales signals weakening consumer spending, which reduces expected corporate revenues and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: S&P 500 forward returns are positive in more than 55% of months when RSAFS contracts, or the mean 20-day return conditional on RSAFS contraction is not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained drop in housing starts below 1.4 million units signals a contraction in residential investment and broader construction activity, which precedes negative S&P 500 forward returns through weaker cyclical earnings.
failure_condition: Positive 60-day forward returns follow HOUST readings below 1400 in more than 50% of instances, or the t-statistic of mean returns below threshold versus above is insignificant.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month nonfarm payroll gain below 100 thousand signals a sharp slowdown in labor market momentum, which triggers negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week via downward revisions to consumption and earnings growth.
failure_condition: Positive 5-day forward returns follow decelerating PAYEMS in more than 50% of triggered instances, or the mean return conditional on the trigger is not significantly negative.

mechanism_narrative: An acceleration in real GDP growth relative to the prior quarter signals broad-based aggregate demand expansion, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter through higher expected earnings.
failure_condition: Quarterly GDPC1 acceleration fails to coincide with positive 60-day forward returns in more than 55% of instances, or the rank correlation between GDPC1 growth and forward returns is below 0.03 over a 3-year window.
